T0162.title: Forced Account Takeover
T0162.definition: In underground data trading, the act of forcibly logging into a user account through technical means to extract private information.
T0162.description: In underground data trading, the act of forcibly logging into a user account through technical means to extract private information.
T0162.usageExample: "Forced login data — anyone who's sourced it knows. Straight from the source. Hit me up to talk price."
